message:
Running command: # The irq BFM just defines TEST_SEQ_IRQ and includes the smoke_bfm! Same for others.
# Let's check other BFMs:
for bfm in xip_directed_bfm dma_directed_bfm pinmux_directed_bfm rand_sys_bfm contention_directed_bfm; do
  echo "=== $bfm ==="
  head -15 /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/tb/tb_mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss_${bfm}.v | grep -E "define|include|TEST_SEQ"
done
